description_long: This is a female adult figure dressed in formal business attire, featuring a double-breasted blazer with lapels, a collared shirt, and a necktie. The figure has long, straight hair that falls past the shoulders and is styled with a center part. The pants are tailored and straight-legged, paired with formal dress shoes that have a slight heel. The hands are relaxed and slightly open, positioned at the sides of the body. The facial features are neutral, with a composed expression and defined eyebrows. The overall appearance suggests a professional individual, suitable for urban or office environments.
description: A female adult in formal business attire with a blazer, collared shirt, necktie, tailored pants, and dress shoes, featuring long straight hair and a neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full business suit, necktie, facial features, and both hands at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight fall of the hair, and the side seam of the suit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blazer, straight hair, and the fit of the pants and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, hair length, and the side details of the suit and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with double-breasted blazer, collared shirt, necktie, and tailored pants
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair with center part
